magic_items_index.title: D&D 2024 Magic Items API
magic_items_index.description: Comprehensive collection of magic items organized by category, rarity, and type
magic_items_index.organization: Individual JSON files for each magic item with consistent schema

all_items.name: Amulet of Proof against Detection and Location
Figurine of Wondrous Power: Bronze Griffon
Figurine of Wondrous Power: Ebony Fly
Figurine of Wondrous Power: Golden Lions
Figurine of Wondrous Power: Ivory Goats
Figurine of Wondrous Power: Marble Elephant
Figurine of Wondrous Power: Obsidian Steed
Figurine of Wondrous Power: Onyx Dog
Figurine of Wondrous Power: Serpentine Owl
Figurine of Wondrous Power: Silver Raven

armor.name: Armor
armor.description: Magical versions of armor from Equipment. Must be worn for magic to function

potions.name: Potions
potions.description: Magical brews or oils that must be imbibed or applied. Consumable items

rings.name: Rings
rings.description: Rings worn on fingers or similar digits. Must be worn for magic to function

rods.name: Rods
rods.description: Scepters made of metal, wood, or bone. Can usually be used as Arcane Focus

scrolls.name: Scrolls
scrolls.description: Rolls of paper or parchment containing spells or incantations. Consumable items

staffs.name: Staffs
staffs.description: Staffs of varying appearance (wood, metal, crystal). Can be used as Quarterstaff and Arcane Focus

wands.name: Wands
wands.description: Typically 12-15 inches long, crafted of metal, bone, or wood. Can usually be used as Arcane Focus

weapons.name: Weapons
weapons.description: Magical versions of weapons from Equipment. Some specify weapon type

wondrous.name: Wondrous Items
wondrous.description: Diverse category including boots, belts, capes, amulets, bags, carpets, figurines, horns, etc.

common.description: Most plentiful, often bought in towns or cities

rare.description: Found mainly in cities, rare locations

very_rare.description: Might be sold only in wondrous locations

requires_attunement.description: Items that require attunement to function

no_attunement.description: Items that do not require attunement

consumable_items.description: Single-use items that are consumed upon activation

sentient_items.description: Magic items with sentience and personality
sentient_items.note: Single-use items like potions and scrolls are never sentient

cursed_items.description: Items bearing curses that affect their users
cursed_items.note: Most identification methods fail to reveal curses

resistance_providing.description: Items providing damage resistance or immunity

spell_storing.description: Items that can store and cast spells
